---
title: "13_additional_report_figures_light_theme"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(forcats)
library(scales)

dir.create(here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Light purple + black report theme
#--------------------------------------------------

theme_report <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "#E6DFF5", linewidth = 0.35),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = base_size + 4),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(colour = "#4B3B66", size = base_size),
      legend.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"))
}

purple_class <- c(
  "No" = "#111111",
  "Yes" = "#A78BFA")

purple_source <- c(
  "Clinical" = "#E9D5FF",
  "Expression" = "#C4B5FD",
  "Methylation" = "#8B5CF6",
  "Multiomic" = "#111111")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Cohort construction numbers
#--------------------------------------------------

cohort_construction <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("Clinical", "Expression", "Methylation", "Multiomic"),
  `Matched cases` = c(
    n_distinct(clinical_master$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(expr_data$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(meth_data$case_submitter_id),
    n_distinct(multi_data$case_submitter_id)),
  `Labelled cases` = c(
    sum(!is.na(clinical_master$survival_500)),
    sum(!is.na(expr_data$survival_500)),
    sum(!is.na(meth_data$survival_500)),
    sum(!is.na(multi_data$survival_500))))

cohort_construction

write_csv(
  cohort_construction,
  here("outputs", "tables", "cohort_construction_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Figure: cohort construction
#--------------------------------------------------

cohort_plot_df <- cohort_construction %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(`Matched cases`, `Labelled cases`),
    names_to = "Stage",
    values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    Dataset = factor(Dataset, levels = c("Clinical", "Expression", "Methylation", "Multiomic")),
    Stage = factor(Stage, levels = c("Matched cases", "Labelled cases")))

p_cohort <- cohort_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Dataset, y = n, fill = Stage)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.68) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
    vjust = -0.35,
    colour = "black",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Matched cases" = "#C4B5FD",
      "Labelled cases" = "#111111")) +
  labs(
    title = "Cohort construction across modelling datasets",
    subtitle = "Matched cases and labelled 500-day survival cases",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of patients",
    fill = NULL) +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_cohort

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_cohort_construction_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_cohort,
  width = 8.5,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Clinical missingness summary
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "age_at_index",
    "gender",
    "race",
    "ethnicity",
    "days_to_death",
    "days_to_follow_up",
    "survival_500"),
  names(clinical_master))

clinical_missingness <- clinical_master %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(clinical_vars),
      ~ mean(is.na(.x)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Missing proportion") %>%
  mutate(
    `Missing percentage` = `Missing proportion` * 100,
    Variable = str_replace_all(Variable, "_", " "),
    Variable = str_to_title(Variable),
    Variable = fct_reorder(Variable, `Missing percentage`))

clinical_missingness

write_csv(
  clinical_missingness,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_missingness_summary.csv"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Figure: missingness in clinical variables
#--------------------------------------------------

p_clinical_missing <- clinical_missingness %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Missing percentage`, y = Variable)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#8B5CF6", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(`Missing percentage`, 1), "%")),
    hjust = -0.15,
    colour = "black",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(clinical_missingness$`Missing percentage`, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15)) +
  labs(
    title = "Missingness in clinical variables",
    subtitle = "Proportion of missing values in the clinical master dataset",
    x = "Missing values (%)",
    y = NULL) +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_clinical_missing

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_clinical_missingness_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_clinical_missing,
  width = 8.5,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Load processed matrices for PCA and boxplots
#--------------------------------------------------

x_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "x_expression.rds"))
y_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "y_expression.rds"))

x_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "x_methylation.rds"))
y_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "y_methylation.rds"))

y_expression <- factor(y_expression, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
y_methylation <- factor(y_methylation, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Expression PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_pca <- prcomp(
  x_expression,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE)

expr_pca_var <- expr_pca$sdev^2 / sum(expr_pca$sdev^2)

expr_pca_df <- as_tibble(expr_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  mutate(
    survival_500 = y_expression)

p_expr_pca <- expr_pca_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = purple_class) +
  labs(
    title = "Expression PCA",
    subtitle = "Principal components based on selected expression features",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", percent(expr_pca_var[1], accuracy = 0.1), ")"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", percent(expr_pca_var[2], accuracy = 0.1), ")"),
    colour = "Survival > 500 days") +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_expr_pca

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_expression_pca_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_expr_pca,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Methylation PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_pca <- prcomp(
  x_methylation,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE)

meth_pca_var <- meth_pca$sdev^2 / sum(meth_pca$sdev^2)

meth_pca_df <- as_tibble(meth_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  mutate(
    survival_500 = y_methylation)

p_meth_pca <- meth_pca_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = purple_class) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation PCA",
    subtitle = "Principal components based on selected methylation probes",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", percent(meth_pca_var[1], accuracy = 0.1), ")"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", percent(meth_pca_var[2], accuracy = 0.1), ")"),
    colour = "Survival > 500 days") +
  theme_report(base_size = 13)

p_meth_pca

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_methylation_pca_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_meth_pca,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 11. Load top feature importance tables
#--------------------------------------------------

top_expr_features <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  pull(feature)

top_meth_features <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  pull(feature)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 12. Helper function for feature boxplots
#--------------------------------------------------

make_feature_boxplot_df <- function(x, y, selected_features) {
  x %>%
    select(all_of(selected_features)) %>%
    mutate(survival_500 = y) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(selected_features),
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    mutate(
      scaled_value = as.numeric(scale(value))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      survival_500 = factor(survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes")))
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 13. Figure: top expression feature boxplots
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_boxplot_df <- make_feature_boxplot_df(
  x = x_expression,
  y = y_expression,
  selected_features = top_expr_features)

p_expr_boxplot <- expr_boxplot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = survival_500, y = scaled_value, fill = survival_500)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, width = 0.65, outlier.alpha = 0.45) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = purple_class) +
  labs(
    title = "Top expression features by 500-day survival class",
    subtitle = "Values standardised within each selected feature",
    x = "Survival > 500 days",
    y = "Standardised expression value",
    fill = "Survival > 500 days") +
  theme_report(base_size = 12)

p_expr_boxplot

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_top_expression_boxplots_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_expr_boxplot,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.8,
  dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 14. Figure: top methylation feature boxplots
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_boxplot_df <- make_feature_boxplot_df(
  x = x_methylation,
  y = y_methylation,
  selected_features = top_meth_features)

p_meth_boxplot <- meth_boxplot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = survival_500, y = scaled_value, fill = survival_500)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8, width = 0.65, outlier.alpha = 0.45) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = purple_class) +
  labs(
    title = "Top methylation features by 500-day survival class",
    subtitle = "Values standardised within each selected probe",
    x = "Survival > 500 days",
    y = "Standardised methylation value",
    fill = "Survival > 500 days") +
  theme_report(base_size = 12)

p_meth_boxplot

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "figure_top_methylation_boxplots_light_purple.png"),
  plot = p_meth_boxplot,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.8,
  dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 15. Save figure manifest
#--------------------------------------------------

additional_figure_manifest <- tibble(
  figure = c(
    "Cohort construction",
    "Clinical missingness",
    "Expression PCA",
    "Methylation PCA",
    "Top expression feature boxplots",
    "Top methylation feature boxplots"),
  file = c(
    "figure_cohort_construction_light_purple.png",
    "figure_clinical_missingness_light_purple.png",
    "figure_expression_pca_light_purple.png",
    "figure_methylation_pca_light_purple.png",
    "figure_top_expression_boxplots_light_purple.png",
    "figure_top_methylation_boxplots_light_purple.png"))

write_csv(
  additional_figure_manifest,
  here("outputs", "figures", "report_theme", "additional_figure_manifest.csv"))

additional_figure_manifest
```
